# Announcements Feature Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Add a native announcements feature to the Sapporo Chess Club site (home section + list page + detail pages + RSS), editable via Pages CMS in Japanese only, with English content auto-generated by a GitHub Action.

**Architecture:** Astro content collection (`announcements`) with markdown body, frontmatter holds bilingual title/description and a `bodyEn` string. ja body uses Astro's native `<Content />`, en body uses `marked` to render the frontmatter string. Three new shared `*Page.astro` components mirror the existing `HomePage`/`SchedulePage`/`TournamentsPage` pattern; routes are 4-line wrappers. Translation runs as a GitHub Action that calls Claude API (primary) or DeepL (fallback) and commits results back.

**Tech Stack:** Astro 6, Svelte 5, Tailwind v4, Pages CMS, Claude API (`@anthropic-ai/sdk`), DeepL API, `@astrojs/rss`, `@tailwindcss/typography`, `marked`, `gray-matter`.

**Validation strategy:** This project has **no test framework** (no Vitest, no Playwright, no `*.test.ts` files anywhere). Adding a test infrastructure for one feature is out of scope. Validation is done via:
1. `pnpm build` for type/schema/build errors
2. `pnpm preview` for visual / interaction confirmation
3. `git diff` review of translation Action output

If a step references "test", it means "build the site and verify".

**Branch:** All work happens on `feature/announcements` (already created from main, currently has `36e7072` and `dc10176`). Do **not** push to `origin` and do **not** merge to main during implementation.

---

## File Structure

**New files:**
- `src/content/announcements/2026-04-12-summer-tournament-open.md` — first sample entry
- `src/components/Announcements.astro` — Home section (latest 3 entries)
- `src/components/AnnouncementsListPage.astro` — `/announcements` body (year-grouped list)
- `src/components/AnnouncementDetailPage.astro` — `/announcements/[slug]` body
- `src/pages/announcements/index.astro` — ja list route (thin wrapper)
- `src/pages/announcements/[slug].astro` — ja detail route (thin wrapper)
- `src/pages/en/announcements/index.astro` — en list route
- `src/pages/en/announcements/[slug].astro` — en detail route
- `src/pages/rss.xml.ts` — RSS feed endpoint
- `scripts/translate-announcements.ts` — translator script (used by Action)
- `.github/workflows/translate-announcements.yml` — Action workflow

**Modified files:**
- `package.json` — add deps
- `astro.config.mjs` — add `@astrojs/rss` integration is not needed (RSS uses endpoint, not integration); add `@tailwindcss/typography` if needed
- `src/content.config.ts` — add `announcements` collection
- `src/i18n/ja.ts` / `src/i18n/en.ts` — add `announcements`/`menu.announcements`/`sections.announcements` keys
- `src/components/HomePage.astro` — insert `<Announcements />` after `<NextEvent />`
- `src/components/Header.astro` — add お知らせ link
- `src/components/HamburgerMenu.svelte` — add お知らせ to `pages` array
- `.pages.yml` — add announcements collection
- `.gitignore` — add `.superpowers/`

### Task 2: Add the `announcements` content collection schema

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/content.config.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add the schema**

Open `src/content.config.ts`. Add a new collection at the bottom of the const declarations, before `export const collections`:

```ts
const announcements = defineCollection({
  loader: glob({ pattern: "**/*.md", base: "./src/content/announcements" }),
  schema: z.object({
    title: z.object({
      ja: z.string(),
      en: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    description: z.object({
      ja: z.string(),
      en: z.string().optional(),
    }),
    date: z.string(),
    bodyEn: z.string().optional(),
  }),
});
```

Then add `announcements` to the `collections` export:

```ts
export const collections = { schedule, tournaments, lessons, links, site, announcements };
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Create the empty content directory**

Run:
```bash
mkdir -p src/content/announcements
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Create one sample announcement**

Create `src/content/announcements/2026-04-12-summer-tournament-open.md`:

```md
---
title:
  ja: "夏の大会の申込を開始しました"
description:
  ja: "7月19-20日開催の札幌サマーチェス大会の参加申込を受付中です。"
date: "2026-04-12"
---

7月19日(日)〜20日(月・祝)に「札幌サマーチェス大会 2026」を開催します。

## 開催概要

- 日時: 2026年7月19日(日)〜20日(月・祝)
- 会場: かでる2.7 1010
- 参加費: 一般 ¥3,000 / 学生 ¥1,500

詳細とお申し込みは [スケジュールページ](/sapporo-chess-club/schedule) からどうぞ。
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Build to verify the schema is valid**

Run: `pnpm build`
Expected: build completes. Astro re-generates content types under `.astro/`.

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add src/content.config.ts src/content/announcements/
git commit -m "feat(announcements): add content collection schema and sample entry"
```

### Task 4: Build the Home `Announcements.astro` section

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/Announcements.astro`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the component**

Create `src/components/Announcements.astro`:

```astro
---
import { getCollection } from "astro:content";
import { t, getLocalePath, type Locale } from "@/i18n";
import { parseDate, getDateParts } from "@/lib/date";

interface Props {
  locale: Locale;
}

const { locale } = Astro.props;
const i = t(locale);
const listHref = getLocalePath(locale, "/announcements");

const all = await getCollection("announcements");
const latest = all
  .sort((a, b) => parseDate(b.data.date).getTime() - parseDate(a.data.date).getTime())
  .slice(0, 3);

function pickTitle(d: { title: { ja: string; en?: string } }) {
  return locale === "ja" ? d.title.ja : (d.title.en ?? d.title.ja);
}
function pickDescription(d: { description: { ja: string; en?: string } }) {
  return locale === "ja" ? d.description.ja : (d.description.en ?? d.description.ja);
}
function isJaFallback(d: { title: { ja: string; en?: string } }) {
  return locale === "en" && !d.title.en;
}
---

{latest.length > 0 && (
  <section id="announcements" class="px-5 py-6 border-t border-[#f5f5f5]">
    <div class="flex items-baseline justify-between mb-2">
      <h2 class="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#737373] flex items-center gap-2">
        <span class="inline-block w-1 h-3 bg-[#2563eb]"></span>
        {i.announcements.label}
      </h2>
      <a href={listHref} class="text-xs text-[#2563eb] hover:text-[#1d4ed8] font-medium">
        {i.announcements.viewAll}
      </a>
    </div>
    <ul class="flex flex-col">
      {latest.map((entry) => {
        const parts = getDateParts(entry.data.date);
        const dateStr = `${parts.year}.${String(parts.month).padStart(2, "0")}.${String(parts.day).padStart(2, "0")}`;
        const detailHref = getLocalePath(locale, `/announcements/${entry.id}`);
        return (
          <li>
            <a
              href={detailHref}
              class="flex flex-col gap-1 py-3 border-b border-[#f5f5f5] last:border-0 hover:bg-[#fafafa] -mx-2 px-2 rounded transition-colors duration-150"
            >
              <div class="flex items-baseline gap-3">
                <span class="text-xs text-[#737373] tabular-nums min-w-[78px]">{dateStr}</span>
                <span class="text-sm font-medium text-[#171717]">
                  {pickTitle(entry.data)}
                  {isJaFallback(entry.data) && (
                    <span class="ml-1.5 inline-block text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#92400e] bg-[#fef3c7] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">JA</span>
                  )}
                </span>
              </div>
              <p class="text-xs text-[#737373] ml-[90px] leading-[1.5]">{pickDescription(entry.data)}</p>
            </a>
          </li>
        );
      })}
    </ul>
  </section>
)}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Build to verify**

Run: `pnpm build`
Expected: passes.

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/components/Announcements.astro
git commit -m "feat(announcements): add home section component"
```

### Task 6: Build the list page component and routes

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/AnnouncementsListPage.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/announcements/index.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/en/announcements/index.astro`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the shared list page component**

Create `src/components/AnnouncementsListPage.astro`:

```astro
---
import { getCollection } from "astro:content";
import BaseLayout from "@/layouts/BaseLayout.astro";
import { t, getLocalePath, type Locale } from "@/i18n";
import { parseDate, getDateParts } from "@/lib/date";

interface Props {
  locale: Locale;
}

const { locale } = Astro.props;
const i = t(locale);

const all = (await getCollection("announcements")).sort(
  (a, b) => parseDate(b.data.date).getTime() - parseDate(a.data.date).getTime()
);

const yearMap = new Map<number, typeof all>();
for (const entry of all) {
  const { year } = getDateParts(entry.data.date);
  if (!yearMap.has(year)) yearMap.set(year, []);
  yearMap.get(year)!.push(entry);
}
const grouped = Array.from(yearMap.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[0] - a[0]);

function pickTitle(d: { title: { ja: string; en?: string } }) {
  return locale === "ja" ? d.title.ja : (d.title.en ?? d.title.ja);
}
function pickDescription(d: { description: { ja: string; en?: string } }) {
  return locale === "ja" ? d.description.ja : (d.description.en ?? d.description.ja);
}
function isJaFallback(d: { title: { ja: string; en?: string } }) {
  return locale === "en" && !d.title.en;
}
---

<BaseLayout title={i.announcements.pageTitle} locale={locale}>
  <section class="px-5 pt-16 md:pt-20 pb-6">
    <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight animate-fade-in-up">
      {i.announcements.pageTitle}
    </h1>
    <p class="text-sm text-[#737373] mt-3 animate-fade-in-up stagger-1">
      {i.announcements.pageSubtitle}
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="px-5 pb-10 animate-fade-in-up stagger-2">
    {all.length === 0 ? (
      <p class="text-sm text-[#737373]">{i.announcements.empty}</p>
    ) : (
      grouped.map(([year, entries]) => (
        <div class="mb-8">
          <h2 class="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#2563eb] mb-3 pb-2 border-b border-[#e5e5e5]">
            {year}{i.schedule.yearSuffix}
          </h2>
          <ul class="flex flex-col">
            {entries.map((entry) => {
              const parts = getDateParts(entry.data.date);
              const md = `${String(parts.month).padStart(2, "0")}.${String(parts.day).padStart(2, "0")}`;
              const detailHref = getLocalePath(locale, `/announcements/${entry.id}`);
              return (
                <li>
                  <a
                    href={detailHref}
                    class="flex flex-col gap-1 py-3 border-b border-[#f5f5f5] last:border-0 hover:bg-[#fafafa] -mx-2 px-2 rounded transition-colors duration-150"
                  >
                    <div class="flex items-baseline gap-3">
                      <span class="text-xs text-[#737373] tabular-nums min-w-[60px]">{md}</span>
                      <span class="text-sm font-medium text-[#171717]">
                        {pickTitle(entry.data)}
                        {isJaFallback(entry.data) && (
                          <span class="ml-1.5 inline-block text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#92400e] bg-[#fef3c7] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">JA</span>
                        )}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-xs text-[#737373] ml-[72px] leading-[1.5]">{pickDescription(entry.data)}</p>
                  </a>
                </li>
              );
            })}
          </ul>
        </div>
      ))
    )}
  </section>
</BaseLayout>
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Create ja route wrapper**

Create `src/pages/announcements/index.astro`:

```astro
---
import AnnouncementsListPage from "@/components/AnnouncementsListPage.astro";
---

<AnnouncementsListPage locale="ja" />
```

`pnpm preview`. Visit `/sapporo-chess-club/announcements/` and `/sapporo-chess-club/en/announcements/`. Confirm the year grouping shows the sample entry under "2026年".

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(announcements): add list page component and ja/en routes"
```

### Task 7: Build the detail page component and routes

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/AnnouncementDetailPage.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/announcements/[slug].astro`
- Create: `src/pages/en/announcements/[slug].astro`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the shared detail page component**

Create `src/components/AnnouncementDetailPage.astro`:

```astro
---
import type { CollectionEntry } from "astro:content";
import { marked } from "marked";
import BaseLayout from "@/layouts/BaseLayout.astro";
import { t, getLocalePath, type Locale } from "@/i18n";
import { parseDate, getDateParts } from "@/lib/date";

interface Props {
  locale: Locale;
  entry: CollectionEntry<"announcements">;
  prev: CollectionEntry<"announcements"> | null;
  next: CollectionEntry<"announcements"> | null;
}

const { locale, entry, prev, next } = Astro.props;
const i = t(locale);
const listHref = getLocalePath(locale, "/announcements");

const parts = getDateParts(entry.data.date);
const dateStr = `${parts.year}.${String(parts.month).padStart(2, "0")}.${String(parts.day).padStart(2, "0")}`;

const title = locale === "ja" ? entry.data.title.ja : (entry.data.title.en ?? entry.data.title.ja);
const isJaFallback = locale === "en" && !entry.data.title.en;

// Render the body. ja uses Astro's <Content />; en uses marked on bodyEn (or ja body fallback).
const { Content } = await entry.render();
const enBodyHtml = entry.data.bodyEn ? marked.parse(entry.data.bodyEn) : null;

function hrefFor(e: CollectionEntry<"announcements"> | null) {
  return e ? getLocalePath(locale, `/announcements/${e.id}`) : null;
}
function titleFor(e: CollectionEntry<"announcements">) {
  return locale === "ja" ? e.data.title.ja : (e.data.title.en ?? e.data.title.ja);
}
---

<BaseLayout title={title} locale={locale}>
  <article class="px-5 pt-16 md:pt-20 pb-10">
    <a href={listHref} class="text-sm text-[#737373] hover:text-[#2563eb] transition-colors duration-150">
      {i.announcements.back}
    </a>

    <p class="text-sm text-[#737373] mt-6 tabular-nums">{dateStr}</p>
    <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight mt-2 leading-tight">
      {title}
      {isJaFallback && (
        <span class="ml-2 inline-block align-middle text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#92400e] bg-[#fef3c7] px-2 py-1 rounded">JA</span>
      )}
    </h1>

    <div class="mt-8 prose prose-sm prose-neutral max-w-none">
      {locale === "ja" || !enBodyHtml ? (
        <Content />
      ) : (
        <Fragment set:html={enBodyHtml} />
      )}
    </div>

    <nav class="flex justify-between mt-12 pt-6 border-t border-[#f5f5f5] text-sm" aria-label="Announcement pagination">
      {prev ? (
        <a href={hrefFor(prev)} class="text-[#2563eb] hover:text-[#1d4ed8] flex flex-col">
          <span class="text-xs text-[#737373]">{i.announcements.prev}</span>
          <span class="font-medium">← {titleFor(prev)}</span>
        </a>
      ) : <span></span>}
      {next ? (
        <a href={hrefFor(next)} class="text-[#2563eb] hover:text-[#1d4ed8] flex flex-col items-end text-right">
          <span class="text-xs text-[#737373]">{i.announcements.next}</span>
          <span class="font-medium">{titleFor(next)} →</span>
        </a>
      ) : <span></span>}
    </nav>
  </article>
</BaseLayout>
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Create ja [slug] route**

Create `src/pages/announcements/[slug].astro`:

```astro
---
import { getCollection } from "astro:content";
import AnnouncementDetailPage from "@/components/AnnouncementDetailPage.astro";
import { parseDate } from "@/lib/date";

export async function getStaticPaths() {
  const all = (await getCollection("announcements")).sort(
    (a, b) => parseDate(b.data.date).getTime() - parseDate(a.data.date).getTime()
  );
  return all.map((entry, idx) => ({
    params: { slug: entry.id },
    props: {
      entry,
      prev: all[idx + 1] ?? null,
      next: all[idx - 1] ?? null,
    },
  }));
}

const { entry, prev, next } = Astro.props;
---

<AnnouncementDetailPage locale="ja" entry={entry} prev={prev} next={next} />
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Create en [slug] route**

Create `src/pages/en/announcements/[slug].astro` with the identical body except `locale="en"`:

```astro
---
import { getCollection } from "astro:content";
import AnnouncementDetailPage from "@/components/AnnouncementDetailPage.astro";
import { parseDate } from "@/lib/date";

export async function getStaticPaths() {
  const all = (await getCollection("announcements")).sort(
    (a, b) => parseDate(b.data.date).getTime() - parseDate(a.data.date).getTime()
  );
  return all.map((entry, idx) => ({
    params: { slug: entry.id },
    props: {
      entry,
      prev: all[idx + 1] ?? null,
      next: all[idx - 1] ?? null,
    },
  }));
}

const { entry, prev, next } = Astro.props;
---

<AnnouncementDetailPage locale="en" entry={entry} prev={prev} next={next} />
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Add `@tailwindcss/typography` to globals.css**

Open `src/styles/globals.css`. After the `@import "tailwindcss";` line (or wherever tailwind is imported), add:

```css
@plugin "@tailwindcss/typography";
```

This enables the `prose` utility classes used in the detail page. (Tailwind v4 uses `@plugin` directive instead of the v3 plugin array.)

### Task 8: Add the RSS feed endpoint

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/rss.xml.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the endpoint**

Create `src/pages/rss.xml.ts`:

```ts
import rss from "@astrojs/rss";
import { getCollection } from "astro:content";
import { parseDate } from "@/lib/date";
import type { APIContext } from "astro";

export async function GET(context: APIContext) {
  const items = (await getCollection("announcements")).sort(
    (a, b) => parseDate(b.data.date).getTime() - parseDate(a.data.date).getTime()
  );
  return rss({
    title: "札幌チェスクラブ お知らせ",
    description: "札幌チェスクラブの新着情報",
    site: context.site!,
    items: items.map((item) => ({
      title: item.data.title.ja,
      description: item.data.description.ja,
      pubDate: parseDate(item.data.date),
      link: `/announcements/${item.id}/`,
    })),
  });
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify `site` is set in astro.config.mjs**

Open `astro.config.mjs`. Confirm `site: "https://kuramoto-to-the-moon.github.io"` or similar exists. If not, add it (Astro RSS requires `context.site` to build absolute URLs).

- [ ] **Step 3: Build**

Run: `pnpm build`
Expected: `dist/rss.xml` is generated.

Verify with: `head -20 dist/rss.xml`
Expected: valid RSS XML with one item for the sample announcement.

```bash
git commit -m "feat(announcements): add RSS feed endpoint at /rss.xml"
```

### Task 11: Add the announcements collection to `.pages.yml` (Pages CMS)

**Files:**
- Modify: `.pages.yml`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add the collection definition**

Open `.pages.yml`. Add a new entry under `content:`, after the `tournaments` collection (so the order matches site navigation):

```yaml
  - name: announcements
    label: お知らせ
    description: "新着情報・お知らせ。日本語で書けば英語は GitHub Action が自動翻訳します。"
    type: collection
    path: src/content/announcements
    format: yaml-frontmatter
    view:
      fields: [date, title.ja]
      primary: title.ja
      sort: [date]
      default:
        sort: date
        order: desc
    fields:
      - name: date
        label: 公開日
        type: date
        required: true
        description: "YYYY-MM-DD 形式。新しい順に並びます。"
      - name: title
        label: タイトル
        type: object
        fields:
          - { name: ja, label: 日本語, type: string, required: true }
          - { name: en, label: English (自動翻訳), type: string }
      - name: description
        label: 概要 (一覧の 1 行抜粋)
        type: object
        fields:
          - { name: ja, label: 日本語, type: text, required: true }
          - { name: en, label: English (自動翻訳), type: text }
      - name: bodyEn
        label: 本文 English (自動翻訳・編集可)
        type: text
        description: "GitHub Action が自動生成。修正したい場合のみ手動で書き換え。"
```

### Task 12: Write the translator script

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/translate-announcements.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the script**

Create `scripts/translate-announcements.ts`:

```ts
#!/usr/bin/env tsx
/**
 * Translate Japanese announcement frontmatter and body to English using
 * Claude API (primary) or DeepL API (fallback). Writes results back to the
 * same markdown file. Idempotent — only fills in missing en fields.
 *
 * Required env (one of):
 *   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
 *   DEEPL_API_KEY
 */
import { readdir, readFile, writeFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { join } from "node:path";
import matter from "gray-matter";
import Anthropic from "@anthropic-ai/sdk";

const DIR = "src/content/announcements";

interface AnnouncementFrontmatter {
  title: { ja: string; en?: string };
  description: { ja: string; en?: string };
  date: string;
  bodyEn?: string;
}

async function translateClaude(texts: string[]): Promise<string[]> {
  const client = new Anthropic();
  const numbered = texts.map((t, i) => `[${i + 1}]\n${t}`).join("\n\n---\n\n");
  const prompt = `You are translating short announcements for a chess club website from Japanese to natural English. Preserve markdown formatting (headings, lists, links). Keep proper nouns like 札幌チェスクラブ as "Sapporo Chess Club", かでる2.7 as "Kaderu 2.7". Translate each numbered section. Output only the translations in the same numbered format, with [1], [2], etc. and nothing else.\n\n${numbered}`;
  const res = await client.messages.create({
    model: "claude-opus-4-6",
    max_tokens: 4096,
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: prompt }],
  });
  const text = res.content
    .filter((b) => b.type === "text")
    .map((b) => (b as { text: string }).text)
    .join("");
  // Parse [1] [2] [3] sections
  const sections = text.split(/^\[(\d+)\]\s*$/m).filter(Boolean);
  const out: string[] = [];
  for (let i = 1; i < sections.length; i += 2) {
    out[parseInt(sections[i]) - 1] = sections[i + 1].trim();
  }
  if (out.length !== texts.length || out.some((s) => !s)) {
    throw new Error(`Claude translation parse failed (expected ${texts.length}, got ${out.filter(Boolean).length})`);
  }
  return out;
}

async function translateDeepL(texts: string[]): Promise<string[]> {
  const key = process.env.DEEPL_API_KEY!;
  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  params.append("auth_key", key);
  params.append("source_lang", "JA");
  params.append("target_lang", "EN");
  texts.forEach((t) => params.append("text", t));
  const res = await fetch("https://api-free.deepl.com/v2/translate", {
    method: "POST",
    body: params,
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`DeepL API error: ${res.status} ${await res.text()}`);
  const data = (await res.json()) as { translations: { text: string }[] };
  return data.translations.map((t) => t.text);
}

async function translate(texts: string[]): Promise<string[]> {
  if (process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) {
    try {
      return await translateClaude(texts);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Claude translation failed, trying DeepL:", err);
    }
  }
  if (process.env.DEEPL_API_KEY) {
    return await translateDeepL(texts);
  }
  throw new Error("No translation API key available (set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or DEEPL_API_KEY)");
}

async function main() {
  const files = (await readdir(DIR)).filter((f) => f.endsWith(".md"));
  let changed = 0;

  for (const file of files) {
    const path = join(DIR, file);
    const raw = await readFile(path, "utf-8");
    const parsed = matter(raw);
    const fm = parsed.data as AnnouncementFrontmatter;

    const needs: { key: "title.en" | "description.en" | "bodyEn"; ja: string }[] = [];
    if (!fm.title.en) needs.push({ key: "title.en", ja: fm.title.ja });
    if (!fm.description.en) needs.push({ key: "description.en", ja: fm.description.ja });
    if (!fm.bodyEn && parsed.content.trim()) needs.push({ key: "bodyEn", ja: parsed.content.trim() });

    if (needs.length === 0) continue;

    console.log(`Translating ${file} (${needs.length} fields)`);
    const translated = await translate(needs.map((n) => n.ja));

    needs.forEach((n, i) => {
      if (n.key === "title.en") fm.title.en = translated[i];
      else if (n.key === "description.en") fm.description.en = translated[i];
      else if (n.key === "bodyEn") fm.bodyEn = translated[i];
    });

    const out = matter.stringify(parsed.content, fm);
    await writeFile(path, out, "utf-8");
    changed++;
  }

  console.log(`Done. ${changed} file(s) updated.`);
}

main().catch((err) => {
  console.error(err);
  process.exit(1);
});
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Local dry-run (optional, only if you have an API key)**

If you have `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` exported in your shell:

```bash
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-... pnpm tsx scripts/translate-announcements.ts
```

Expected: the sample md file gets `title.en`, `description.en`, `bodyEn` filled in. Verify with `cat src/content/announcements/2026-04-12-summer-tournament-open.md`.

If no API key: skip this step and continue. (The Action will run it in CI.)

If you ran the dry-run, **do not commit the translated file** — the goal of this task is to land the script, not the translation. Run `git checkout src/content/announcements/2026-04-12-summer-tournament-open.md` to revert.

- [ ] **Step 3: Build to confirm tsx compiles the script**

Run: `pnpm tsx scripts/translate-announcements.ts --help 2>&1 | head -3 || true`
Expected: tsx is able to import the script (it may fail due to missing API key, that's fine — we just want to confirm the script is parseable).

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add scripts/translate-announcements.ts
git commit -m "feat(announcements): add translator script (Claude + DeepL fallback)"
```

---

### Task 13: Add the GitHub Action workflow

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/translate-announcements.yml`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the workflow**

Create `.github/workflows/translate-announcements.yml`:

```yaml
name: Translate announcements

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - feature/announcements
    paths:
      - "src/content/announcements/**"

# Allow the workflow to push back the translation commit
permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: translate-announcements-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  translate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          # Use a token that can push back. The default GITHUB_TOKEN works
          # because we set permissions.contents: write above.
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "22"
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run translator
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          DEEPL_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEEPL_API_KEY }}
        run: pnpm tsx scripts/translate-announcements.ts

      - name: Commit translations if any
        run: |
          if [[ -n "$(git status --porcelain src/content/announcements)" ]]; then
            git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
            git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
            git add src/content/announcements
            git commit -m "chore(announcements): auto-translate ja → en [skip ci]"
            git push
          else
            echo "No translation changes."
          fi
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify YAML syntax**

Run: `pnpm dlx js-yaml .github/workflows/translate-announcements.yml >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo OK || echo FAIL`
Expected: `OK` (or if `js-yaml` is not available, just visually scan the YAML).

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add .github/workflows/translate-announcements.yml
git commit -m "feat(announcements): add github action for auto-translation"
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Document the secrets requirement**

Append to the spec doc `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-08-announcements-design.md` a brief operational note (or to a new `docs/announcements-secrets.md`):

```md
## Operational note: GitHub Secrets

For the translation Action to work, an admin needs to configure at least one of:
- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` — Anthropic Claude API key (recommended)
- `DEEPL_API_KEY` — DeepL API key (free tier: 500k chars/month)

Add via: GitHub → Repository settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret.

Without either secret, the Action will fail and editors will see ja content on en pages until secrets are configured.
```

Commit:

```bash
git add docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-08-announcements-design.md
git commit -m "docs(announcements): document required github secrets for translation"
```

---

## Self-Review

**Spec coverage:**
- Goals ✓ — all goals (CMS edit, SEO, archival, EN auto-translation, design consistency, RSS) covered by tasks 1–13
- Non-goals ✓ — pinned posts, hero images, RSVP, members area all explicitly excluded
- Architecture ✓ — Tasks 4 / 6 / 7 implement the three components, Tasks 5 / 6 / 7 wire routes, Task 8 RSS, Task 11 CMS, Tasks 12 / 13 translation
- Branch isolation ✓ — Task 14 step 3 verifies main untouched

**Placeholder scan:** Searched for TBD/TODO/"add appropriate"/etc. — none found. Each step has either complete code or a concrete shell command.

**Type consistency:**
- `CollectionEntry<"announcements">` used consistently in detail page and slug routes
- `pickTitle` / `pickDescription` / `isJaFallback` helpers duplicated in Announcements.astro and AnnouncementsListPage.astro (acceptable: 3 small functions, not worth a separate util file for two consumers; if a third consumer appears, extract to `lib/announcement-helpers.ts`)
- Frontmatter shape `{ title: { ja: string; en?: string }, description: ..., date, bodyEn? }` consistent across schema (Task 2), components (Tasks 4/6/7), and translator (Task 12)
- `entry.id` used consistently for URL slug (Astro content collection convention)

**Possible footguns flagged:**
- Task 7 step 4: Tailwind v4 `@plugin` syntax. If the project's Tailwind setup doesn't recognize `@plugin`, the engineer may need to add `@tailwindcss/typography` differently (e.g., via `astro.config.mjs` Tailwind config). Task notes this as Tailwind v4 specific.
- Task 8: requires `astro.config.mjs` to have `site:` set. Step 2 reminds to check.
- Task 12: gray-matter `stringify` may reorder frontmatter keys vs original. Acceptable since Pages CMS reads keys by name, not position.
- Task 13: Action runs on `feature/announcements` branch — when this branch is eventually deleted post-merge, the trigger should be cleaned up (already noted in spec § ブランチ戦略).
